reasons: The primary queue now represents generated contenders instead of canonical motions, which restores the boundary that contenders are preview-only and not motions.
Canonical motions remain visible as a separate read-only reference section sourced from .nexus/motions/**.

Acceptance checks Q-01 through Q-19 passed and the required gates passed.
No runtime proof files changed, no existing motion packages were mutated, and no orchestration widening was introduced.
